python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-03-10':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

blocks.content:
QID: 211346
Title: Which team will Royal Challengers Bengaluru host when the 2026 Indian Premier League season begins by March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. The 2026 IPL season is scheduled to begin later this month. The league publishes an official opening fixture naming both teams in the first match.
---
QID: 425983
Title: Which substitute will be officially credited with two goals for Paris St Germain against Chelsea in their UEFA Champions League last-16 first leg by March 11, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-24. Paris St Germain and Chelsea are scheduled to meet in a UEFA Champions League last-16 first leg. A substitute is a player who enters the match after it has started.
---
QID: 559340
Title: Which hacking persona will publicly claim responsibility for a retaliatory cyberattack on a global medical-device company by March 11, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. During periods of regional conflict, hacktivist or state-linked groups sometimes announce retaliatory cyber operations against commercial targets. This question asks for the public-facing name used by the claimant.
---
QID: 807049
Title: Who will score the first hat-trick of his career in the UEFA Champions League round-of-16 first leg between Real Madrid and Manchester City by March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-03-07. Real Madrid and Manchester City are about to begin a two-leg UEFA Champions League knockout tie. A single player could decide the opening match with a standout scoring performance.
---
QID: 828811
Title: Which organisation will Israeli media say was using the apartment hit in central Beirut by March 11, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-03-04. In wartime reporting, media accounts sometimes identify an armed group allegedly linked to a struck site, while that group may dispute the claim. This question asks for the organisation named in public reporting about a central Beirut strike.
---
